testcase.name: test_work_cycle_totals_preserved_after_reconcile

failure.message: AssertionError: assert True is False + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff35e497fac0>('is_leave_period', False) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff35e497fac0> = {'break_violations_count': 0, 'days_worked': 0, 'decoucher_count': 0, 'ended_at': '2026-05-22T21:58:36.484047+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leave_reconciliation.py:327: in test_work_cycle_totals_preserved_after_reconcile assert d["previous_cycle"].get("is_leave_period", False) is False E AssertionError: assert True is False E + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff35e497fac0>('is_leave_period', False) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff35e497fac0> = {'break_violations_count': 0, 'days_worked': 0, 'decoucher_count': 0, 'ended_at': '2026-05-22T21:58:36.484047+00:00', ...}.get
